hih4030_init.tooltip: Initialize HIH4030 analog humidity sensor with specified analog pin and supply voltage

hih4030_get_rh.tooltip: Read raw relative humidity value from HIH4030 sensor

hih4030_get_true_rh.tooltip: Read true relative humidity from HIH4030 with temperature compensation

hih4030_vout.tooltip: Read the analog output voltage of HIH4030 sensor
